comment.body:
## Tau Agent Handoff

- Result: `COMPLETED`
- Summary: GitHub live mutation remains gated; this handoff exists to exercise Tau's GitHub projection, redaction, and policy chain without applying a public mutation.
- Next agent: `reviewer`
- Executor: `local`
- Stop condition: Stop before live GitHub apply unless a human approval packet names repo grahama1970/tau and issue#47.

<!-- tau-agent-handoff:v1 -->
```json
{
  "context": {
    "artifacts": [
      "experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/herdr-gc-real-apply-20260705/herdr-gc-receipt.json",
      "experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/dag-route-memory-approved-sync-20260705/dag-route-memory-sync-receipt.json",
      "experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/github-apply-gated-preflight-20260705/github-transport-dry-run-receipt.json"
    ],
    "summary": "Tau hardening proof lanes produced bounded receipts for provider, DAG, Herdr cleanup, Memory route-memory sync, browser/CDP, and GitHub dry-run policy surfaces."
  },
  "github": {
    "repo": "grahama1970/tau",
    "target": "issue#47"
  },
  "goal": {
    "goal_hash": "sha256:tau-broader-hardening-20260705",
    "goal_id": "tau-broader-hardening",
    "goal_version": 1
  },
  "next_agent": {
    "executor": "local",
    "name": "reviewer",
    "reason": "Reviewer should inspect bounded proof artifacts and non-claims."
  },
  "previous_subagent": "coder",
  "rationale": "Reviewer should inspect proof receipts before any public GitHub update is approved.",
  "required_evidence": [
    "reviewer verifies Herdr GC receipt",
    "reviewer verifies Memory sync and readback receipt",
    "human explicitly approves any live GitHub comment before --apply"
  ],
  "result": {
    "evidence": [
      "Herdr GC apply closed stale Tau workspaces and post-verified absence.",
      "Memory route-memory sync wrote one quality-gated route signal and readback found it.",
      "GitHub transport is dry-run unless explicit apply approval names this target."
    ],
    "status": "COMPLETED",
    "summary": "GitHub live mutation remains gated; this handoff exists to exercise Tau's GitHub projection, redaction, and policy chain without applying a public mutation."
  },
  "schema": "tau.agent_handoff.v1",
  "stop_condition": "Stop before live GitHub apply unless a human approval packet names repo grahama1970/tau and issue#47."
}
```
